description_long: This is a modern, expansive bungalow with a flat and gabled roof combination, surrounded by a manicured lawn and enclosed by a dark fence. The front facade features a double garage, a paved driveway, and a symmetrical arrangement of windows and doors, with landscaping including shrubs and a blossoming tree. The rear of the bungalow opens to a spacious backyard with outdoor seating, a fire pit, and a dining area, as well as large glass doors and windows that provide ample natural light. The side views reveal additional green space, a patio, and a mix of single and double-height sections, indicating a partial second story. The exterior is finished in white and dark gray, with clean lines and a contemporary aesthetic. The property is designed for residential use, offering multiple entry points and outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, white and dark gray bungalow with a mix of flat and gabled roofs, large windows, double garage, and landscaped front and back yards enclosed by a dark fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entrance, symmetrical windows, and landscaped front yard with shrubs and a blossoming tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and extensive green lawn, with a clear view of the fence and backyard layout.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large glass doors, outdoor dining and seating areas, fire pit, and a mix of single and double-height sections.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, additional green space, and the transition between the front and back yards.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
